title: Create Limonata Permits
description: Adds Permits like the ones in Hermitcraft for multiplayer use. Made for the Create Limonata modpack
body:
**Hermits Permits ispired models with a reskin for the create limonata server**

This mod adds three item that have the shape of scrolls like the permits form the Hermitcraft server.

The permits have have three tiers (Iron, Gold, Diamond) each tier has a rarity.

The mode was made to be used in the Create Limonata modpack (hence the reskin).
